summary: Completed comprehensive testing of InvoicePush CRM features. All backend APIs and frontend UI components are working correctly with proper integration.
passed_tests: Customer list displays status tags (Active, Follow-up Needed, Overdue, Inactive)
Customer list shows Total Billed and Balance Due columns with correct currency formatting
Customer profile page loads with all CRM details (GST, PAN, address, onboarding date)
Customer profile shows stats cards (Total Billed: ₹32,500, Paid: ₹0, Balance Due: ₹32,500, Invoice Count: 2)
Customer profile displays Contact Information, Business Details, and Active Services sections
Customer profile tabs (Invoices, Reminders, Activity) work correctly
Add customer form includes all CRM fields (GST, PAN, city, state, pincode, active services, onboarding date)
Invoice creation auto-fills customer GST number and address correctly
Invoice creation pre-selects active services from customer profile (AI Creatives ₹15,000, Meta Ads Services ₹40,000)
Customer activity notes functionality works (add/view notes)
Customer status calculation works correctly (Overdue, Follow-up Needed based on invoice status)
Backend APIs for customers CRUD operations work correctly
Backend APIs for customer notes work correctly
Backend APIs for invoice creation with auto-fill work correctly

success_percentage.frontend: 100% - All UI components and integrations working correctly
